case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. RIGOBERTO GORDILLO-SANCHEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-31-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
